headline: Construction site accident injury Preparation Checklist — Bountiful
articleBody:
Construction site accident injury Preparation Checklist for Bountiful Clients

Before your Construction site accident injury appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
